title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 73/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 73/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 68.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: The theory that Streeting has backed Rejoin to undermine Burnham in the by-election is wrong – he’s long been pro-European and was calling Brexit “a problem” last Oct. www.thetimes.com/uk/politics/...
